description: Kuma Control Plane — xDS generation, store operations, leader election, gRPC server

panels.description: Control plane build info
panels.title: CP Info

panels.description: 1 = this instance is leader. Only one instance should be leader per zone.
panels.title: Leader Status

panels.description: Number of active xDS streams between CP and data plane proxies
panels.title: Active xDS Streams

panels.description: Total number of Dataplane resources — should closely match active xDS streams
panels.title: Dataplane Count

panels.description: Rate of successful xDS config generations vs errors
panels.title: xDS Generation Rate

panels.description: xDS responses sent to proxies and ACK/NACK confirmations received
panels.title: xDS Message Exchange

panels.description: xDS responses sent broken down by resource type (CDS, LDS, EDS, SDS)
panels.title: xDS Responses by Resource Type

panels.description: 99th percentile latency of xDS config generation per proxy type and result
panels.title: xDS Generation Latency (p99)

panels.description: 99th percentile latency of xDS config delivery to proxies including ACK/NACK
panels.title: xDS Delivery Latency (p99)
Zone Watch Interval
panels.description: How often the Global CP polls each Zone CP for health/status. High values may indicate connectivity issues between Global and Zone CPs.
Number of resources tracked by the control plane, by type
panels.title: Resource Count

panels.description: Number of policy resources tracked by the control plane
panels.title: Policy Count

panels.description: Number of events dropped in the event bus due to full channels — non-zero indicates backpressure
panels.title: Events Dropped

panels.description: 99th percentile latency of store operations (get, list, create, update, delete) against the backend
panels.title: Store Operation Latency (p99)

panels.description: Rate of store operations by type
panels.title: Store Operations Rate

panels.description: Store cache hit/miss rate — hits reduce backend load
panels.title: Store Cache Performance

panels.description: Ratio of CA cache hits vs misses. High hit rate means fewer expensive cert operations.
panels.title: CA Cache Hit Rate

panels.description: Minimum days until the first Envoy certificate expires across all dataplanes in the mesh
panels.title: Dataplane Cert Expiry (min days)

panels.description: Hours until the first certificate expires on each dataplane. Low values indicate upcoming rotations.
panels.title: Dataplane Cert TTL

panels.description: Number of goroutines — sustained growth indicates a leak
panels.title: Goroutines

panels.description: Heap memory allocated and RSS (resident set size)
panels.title: Memory

panels.description: CPU usage rate of the control plane process
panels.title: CPU Usage

panels.description: GC pause duration quantiles
panels.title: GC Duration

panels.description: Open file descriptors vs system limit
panels.title: File Descriptors

panels.description: Rate of requests from the CP to the Kubernetes API server, by HTTP status code
panels.title: API Server Requests by Status

panels.description: Rate of requests from the CP to the Kubernetes API server, by HTTP method
panels.title: API Server Requests by Method

panels.description: Current depth of K8s controller workqueues — sustained non-zero indicates backpressure
panels.title: Workqueue Depth

panels.description: 99th percentile time to process items from K8s workqueues
panels.title: Workqueue Processing Time (p99)

panels.description: Rate of K8s controller reconciliations by controller and result
panels.title: Reconciliation Rate

panels.description: Rate of reconciliation errors per controller — non-zero indicates controller issues
panels.title: Reconciliation Errors

panels.description: 99th percentile reconciliation latency per controller
panels.title: Reconciliation Latency (p99)

panels.description: Admission webhook request latency (p99) and request rate
panels.title: Webhook Latency (p99)

panels.description: 99th percentile latency of periodic component loops (hostname generator, status updaters, store counter)
panels.title: Component Loop Latency (p99)

panels.description: Insights resyncer event processing time and processor idle time
panels.title: Insights Resyncer (p99)

panels.description: 99th percentile HTTP request latency on the data plane server (SDS, bootstrap, health)
panels.title: DP Server Request Latency (p99)

panels.description: Number of inflight HTTP requests on the data plane server
panels.title: DP Server Inflight Requests

panels.description: Rate of gRPC messages sent and received by the CP server (xDS/KDS streams)
panels.title: gRPC Message Exchange

panels.description: Rate of new gRPC streams started on the CP server
panels.title: gRPC Streams Started Rate

title: Kuma Control Plane
